name: M1H250W
comment: The M1H250W is a compact hybrid mover with 3-facet prism and frost, iris, an 8-colour wheel, fixed and interchangeable rotating gobo wheels and a beam angle of 7.5~40°.

gwSpecs.description: The M1H250W is a compact hybrid mover with 3-facet prism and frost, iris, an 8-colour wheel, fixed and interchangeable rotating gobo wheels and a beam angle of 7.5~40°.
